---
pagetitle: "Raymond Parcon"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

listing: 
  - id: recent-blog-listing
    contents:
      - "blog/*/*.qmd"
      - "blog/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]
  
  - id: recent-presentation-listing
    contents:
      - "presentations/*/*.qmd"
      - "presentations/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]
  
  - id: recent-paper-listing
    contents:
      - "papers/*/*.qmd"
      - "papers/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]

---

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero mb-5">
  <div class="site-intro">
    <h1 class="site-title text-primary mt-0 fw-lighter text-center text-sm-start">
      Raymond
      <span class="nowrap">Parcon</span>
    </h1>

    <div class="social-icon-links my-3" aria-hidden="true">
      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://github.com/rayparcon"
        title="github"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fab fa-github fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=zDKlF7kAAAAJ&hl=en"
        title="google-scholar"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="ai ai-google-scholar fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3379-3698"
        title="orcid"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="ai ai-orcid fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rayparcon"
        title="linkedin"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fab fa-linkedin fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
      </a>

      <a
        class="link-primary"
        href="https://www.instagram.com/ry.parcs/"
        title="instagram"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fab fa-instagram fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
      </a>


    </div>

    <p class="site-intro fs-5">
      I’m a <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> and a <strong>Ph.D. candidate</strong> in Plant Pathology at the University of Georgia. My research combines genomics and bioinformatics to understand how fungal plant pathogens adapt and evolve to overcome host resistance.
    </p>
    <a class="mt4 action text" href="/about/about.qmd"><em>About Me</em> →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-photo">
    <img src="images/initials_logo.png" alt="RP_icon">
  </div>  
</div>
```

## Latest [Posts](/blog)

::: {#recent-blog-listing}
:::

## Latest [Presentations](/presentations)

::: {#recent-presentation-listing}
:::

## Latest [Papers](/papers)

::: {#recent-paper-listing}
:::

<div>
## This site is currently under construction, but you can find my research papers, presentations, and blog posts here: [rayparcon.github.io/ray-bio](https://rayparcon.github.io/ray-bio)
</div>
